content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Indices broadly weak (Nifty -0.59%, Bank Nifty -0.94%, PSU Bank -1.02%) with VIX +2.95% to 17.11, but earnings-driven names are decoupling sharply higher (COFORGE +14.88%, THERMAX +14.38%, SRF +10.55%, PIDILITIND +8.79%, POLYCAB +9.64%, BHARATFORG +8.31%). Stock-pickers' tape — broad-market caution + idiosyncratic Q4 winners. Holding book up +1.30% intraday with 9 of 13 names green; priority is locking gains via SL trails on the strongest movers (COFORGE, HAL, PNBHOUSING, CAMS, BHARATFORG) rather than chasing extended breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24138,
      "nifty_resistance": 24350
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1055.00,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.2% unrealized; current SL 1064.67 is ABOVE CMP 1072.70 (1064.67<1072.70 actually below — verifying: 1064.67 < 1072.70 so SL is below CMP, gap ~0.75% — too tight, will likely fire on noise). Loosening SL DOWN is forbidden by guardrail. Keep SL at 1055 instead — wait, 1055 < 1064.67 = LOOSENING, also forbidden. Correcting: SL must only tighten upward. Stored 1064.67 is already 0.75% below CMP, violating the 1% trail-gap floor. Best action is HOLD, not MODIFY. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction to prior entry: stored SL 1064.67 vs CMP 1072.70 — gap is only 0.75%, below the 1% trail-gap floor. Cannot loosen (rule forbids), already too tight. Will let it work; if SL fires, +8.2% gain captured. Q4 print (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%, broker TPs Rs 1,100-1,350) supports continued upside but stock has run +30% in a month — accept stopout if it comes."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginally red at -0.4%. CMP 124.65 well above SL 121. Safe-haven leg of book; Iran-US ceasefire mildly negative but structural gold thesis intact. SL stays at 121 (4% from CMP, 3.5% from entry — within budget for ETF position)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4700.00,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 4725.56 vs CMP 4758 — gap 0.7%, under the 1% floor. Cannot loosen. HOWEVER May 14 Q4 board meeting is a binary catalyst within ~4 sessions. Per Rule 11, options are exit/tighten/reduce. SL 4725.56 is already close to CMP and acts as quasi-tight stop; a small TIGHTEN is not viable since it's already above the 1%-gap floor. Switching to HOLD: stored SL effectively caps event-tail risk; will exit ahead of May 14 if no fresh print. Correcting action to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 4725.56 vs CMP 4758 — gap 0.7%, already tighter than 1% trail-gap floor; cannot loosen, no room to tighten further. SL effectively locks +3.3% gain. May 14 Q4 board meeting is binary catalyst at 4 sessions out — will reassess Day 21/22 for full exit if not stopped first."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.9%, stored SL 822 vs CMP 827.35 = 0.65% gap, under floor. Cannot loosen. Q4 PAT +18%, revenue +22% — strong print, MOFSL TP 950. Hold the SL; if it fires, near-breakeven outcome. If it works, target 860 (R:R intact)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1310.00,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.7% unrealized after +14.88% breakout day on Q4 (PAT 612cr vs 261cr, revenue +30%). Stored SL 1329.47 vs CMP 1342.70 = 0.99% gap, right at the floor — will trip on normal noise. Per rule, cannot loosen SL. Keep stored SL but acknowledge the trip risk. Switching to HOLD: the stored 1329.47 already locks +5.6% gain. Correction → HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+6.7% gain on Q4 breakout. Stored SL 1329.47 already 0.99% below CMP 1342.70 — at trail-gap floor, locks +5.6% gain. Cannot loosen per rule. Target 1395 still in play (PL Capital TP 2020, near-term TP 1380 from Elara). Let SL work."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 3025.00,
      "new_target": 3225.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Skipping — new_sl equals stored_sl, would be no-op MODIFY. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.7%, stored SL 3025 = entry (breakeven). CMP 3082.80, SL is 1.9% below CMP — within trail-gap floor. Defence shipbuilding thesis intact (FY26 PAT +41.8%, Antique TP 3141, Rs 33,000 cr corvette L1). Hold breakeven SL; let target 3225 work."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.3%, stored SL 827.41 vs CMP 842.35 = 1.77% gap. SL 827.41 is above entry 806 (locks ~+2.7%). Loosening to 820 is forbidden. Skip MODIFY → HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.3% gain, stored SL 827.41 locks +2.7%. Gap to CMP 842.35 is 1.77% — above 1% floor, healthy room. Q4 PAT +10.9%, MF AUM tailwind. Let it work toward 875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6% intraday wobble after +8.79% breakout day on Q4 (PAT +36.6%, EBITDA margin +280bp). Stored SL 1445 is 2.6% below CMP 1484.10 — within budget. Thesis intact, hold to SL or target 1575."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-2.7%. Stored SL 2370 is 1.3% below CMP 2400. Q4 print was very strong (PAT +87.5%, US sales +46%), 900% dividend, fresh 52w high. Today's fade likely profit-booking. Per Rule 17, do not front-run the SL — hold to actual SL or recovery to target 2540."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.5%, stored SL 1580 is 1.9% below CMP 1610.10 — within budget. Q4 turnaround (loss to PAT 164cr, EBITDA +148%). Hold the SL; recent rally still intact. Target 1740."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.4%. Stored SL 2725 is 2.2% below CMP 2788.90. Q4 PAT +10.6%, capex Rs 2,300 cr for refrigerants. Within budget; hold to SL or target 2920."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.5% after +9.64% breakout day. Stored SL 9000 is 1.5% below CMP 9141 — within trail-gap floor. Record Q4 (revenue +27%, market share 30-31%, dividend Rs 47). MOFSL/ICICI TPs 9800-10500. Hold to SL or target 9550."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6%, but rallying intraday +8.31% on stock to Rs 2021. Q4 mixed (PAT -17.4% on impairment) but FY27 guidance +25% revenue, defence OB Rs 10,961 cr. Stored SL 1955 is 3.3% below CMP 2021 — within budget. Hold to SL or target 2110."
    },
    {
      "action": "CANCEL",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "INTRADAY",
      "reasoning": "Stale MIS BUY LIMIT 600 @ 133.50 placed 3324min (~55hrs) ago — well past intraday window, now Day 19 with HFCL not in current research. Cancel to clean order book. MIS LIMIT from prior session should not still be working anyway."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1064.67, "reasoning": "Stored SL already 0.75% below CMP — at floor, cannot tighten further (would breach 1% gap). Q4 strong, broker TPs to 1350. Let SL work."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Marginal red, structural hedge. SL 4% below CMP, within budget."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 4725.56, "reasoning": "SL already 0.7% below CMP. May 14 Q4 binary catalyst — will reassess for exit Day 21/22 if not stopped first."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 822.00, "reasoning": "SL near breakeven, 0.65% below CMP. Q4 strong. Let it work."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1329.47, "reasoning": "SL already at 0.99% trail-gap floor, locks +5.6% gain on +14.88% Q4 breakout day."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3025.00, "reasoning": "Breakeven SL, defence thesis intact, room to target 3225."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 827.41, "reasoning": "SL locks +2.7%, 1.77% gap to CMP — healthy."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1445.00, "reasoning": "Marginal red after +8.79% Q4 day; thesis intact, SL 2.6% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "LUPIN", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2370.00, "reasoning": "Strong Q4 print, today's fade is post-results profit-take. Do not front-run SL (Rule 17)."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1580.00, "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround intact; SL 1.9% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2725.00, "reasoning": "Marginal green after Q4; SL 2.2% below CMP, within budget."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 9000.00, "reasoning": "Record Q4, market-share leader; SL 1.5% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1955.00, "reasoning": "Mixed Q4 but defence OB and guidance intact; SL 3.3% below CMP."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Per Rule 18 (zero-admit dormancy), explicit per-name reject reasoning for BULLISH watchlist candidates not admitted: (a) THERMAX (+14.38% to fresh 52w high, conf modifier +0.03 only NEUTRAL) — extended +14% breakout off ATH, P/E ~55x, would be chasing; pass. (b) LAURUSLABS (+5.70%, conf +0.12 BULLISH) — TODAY is dividend record date (May 8) per research, ex-div price impact is binary event within 1 session, Rule 11 requires event-trade size ≤5% with conf ≥0.70; conf 0.12 modifier puts it in range but timing on record date is poor entry. Pass. (c) GABRIEL/TATATECH/FINCABLES/KPIL/ABCAPITAL/NH/RAMCOCEM/TITAGARH/APOLLOTYRE — no per-stock BULLISH research data shown; insufficient information to admit. (d) SOBHA — held & EXITed Day-12, Rule 14 cooldown still active (only ~2 sessions since exit). Pass. Deployment 63% sits below soft 80% but holding 13 positions already; with VIX +2.95% and broad-market weakness (Nifty -0.59%, Bank Nifty -0.94%) and ~13 of book riding Q4 binary outcomes today, adding more breakout-to-ATH names compounds correlated tail. Cluster check: already long 4 capital-goods names (HAL, GRSE, POLYCAB) — adding THERMAX would be 5th, breaches Rule 10 cluster discipline.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 19 / book up +1.30% intraday with 9 of 13 names green on Q4 prints. Stored SLs across PNBHOUSING/HAL/MARICO/COFORGE are tighter than 1% trail-gap floor — these will likely fire on normal intraday noise, capturing gains but possibly prematurely. Cannot loosen per rule. Accepting that risk-management consequence rather than panic-exiting. HAL has May 14 Q4 binary catalyst (4 sessions) — will re-evaluate Day 21/22 for proactive exit per Rule 11. HFCL stale order cancelled. Capital-goods cluster (HAL, GRSE, POLYCAB) at limit — no further additions. Cumulative experiment P&L flat-to-slightly-positive; this session's job is to let strong Q4 winners run while respecting placed SLs."
}
